params.name: Niobe's St Rock
params.description:
On Oct 22, 430 BC, the statue of Niobe was made in ancient Greece.
This statue is the work of Scopas, an ancient Greek sculptor, depicting the tragic story of Queen Niobe from Greek mythology. Niobe was the granddaughter of Zeus, had seven sons and seven daughters, and ruled a powerful kingdom. Her arrogance led her to forbid people from worshiping Leto and her children, Apollo and Artemis.
